# Get Quantum Ready with your GPUs – today
## Get Instant access to the hand book

Thank you! Your submission has been received!

Why engineers trust BQPhy®
  * Peer-reviewed quantum-inspired algorithms
  * Compatible with CUDA, ROCm & hybrid stacks
  * Trusted by Fortune 500 engineering teams


The definitive guide to quantum-inspired engineering workflows. Get more from your existing GPU stack while building tomorrow’s quantum advantage.
  * Quantum-inspired algorithms for real GPU workloads
  * Step-by-step migration to hybrid quantum workflows
  * Performance benchmarks vs classical solvers
  * BQPhy QuantumNOW integration playbook


![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/6a15d955627d4e791b197f9a_Cover.png)
### QuantumNOW™  
Practical Handbook
BQPhy® Engineering Team
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67f3db593b0d97779485e24f_close.png)
# Your Journey Starts Here
Our goal is to complete the process within 3–4 weeks, ensuring you have a seamless and rewarding experience
[Work With Us](https://www.bqpsim.com/career)
Hiring Process
At BQP, we believe in building an exceptional team through a thoughtful and candidate-friendly hiring process. We’re as excited to get to know you as you are to explore this opportunity with us! Here’s a quick look at how we welcome talent into our fold:
Founders’ First Look
Your application is directly evaluated by our founders. We pick candidates who align with our mission
Screening Call
A 15–20 minute chat about your goals and the role with the hiring manager
Your First Interview
Meet the vision drivers. Discuss expertise, problem-solving, and cultural fit
Technical Assignment
Showcase your skills with a focused, flexible task  

Final Interview
Deep Dive: Final Interview with hiring manager and CXO  

Decision and Offer
Dive into your skills, leadership, and how you will contribute
[JOIN OUR TEAM](https://www.bqpsim.com/career)
Working at BQP
At BQP, we embrace a dynamic, fun, cross-cultural environment where innovation thrives. Our diverse team blends expertise and experience, working at the heart of disruptive technology. With headquarters in the US and offices in India, we operate seamlessly across time zones.  
  
Join us, for an opportunity to collaborate with industry experts and leaders. BQP works with highly innovative companies worldwide, contributing to projects that span the Globe.

Opportunities like this don’t wait, neither should you!  

[Apply Now](https://www.bqpsim.com/apply-now)
Seeking bold minds with grit, vision, and drive
We Look for Attitude Over Skills
For us, it’s not just about what you know, it’s about who you are and how you approach challenges
Unyielding Passion for Scientific Pursuit
You have a relentless drive to explore, question, and discover. Curiosity fuels you, and you’re never satisfied with the status quo
Crazy, Out-of-the-Box Thinker
You thrive on unconventional ideas and creative solutions. Thinking differently and finding unique perspectives are second nature to you
Fluid and Agile
You adapt like water, seamlessly working across cultures, time zones, and intercontinental teams. Agility and collaboration are your superpowers
Believer in Progress Over Perfection
For you, 80% done is often excellent. You focus on delivering value fast, refining along the way, and embracing momentum over endless tweaking.

Communication Enthusiast
You believe that no detail is too small to share. Whether it’s a challenge, a problem, or a solution, you ensure everyone is in the loop, all the time.

Be Part of Something Bigger

Hiring Process
At BQP, we believe in building an exceptional team through a thoughtful and candidate-friendly hiring process. We’re as excited to get to know you as you are to explore this opportunity with us! Here’s a quick look at how we welcome talent into our fold:
Founders’ First Look

Your First Interview

Final Interview

Working at BQP
At BQP, we embrace a dynamic, fun, cross-cultural environment where innovation thrives. Our diverse team blends expertise and experience, working at the heart of disruptive technology. With headquarters in the US and offices in India, we operate seamlessly across time zones.

Join us, for an opportunity to collaborate with industry experts and leaders. BQP works with highly innovative companies worldwide, contributing to projects that span the Globe.
